title: aquilegia viridiflora f. atropurpurea
intro: Aquilegia viridiflora f. atropurpurea, also known as the green-flowered columbine, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the Ranunculaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Aquilegia viridiflora f. atropurpurea include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and providing antioxidant protection. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
